hero.title: A System, Not a Campaign.
hero.subtitle: Stop guessing why your revenue is stalling. We bridge the gap between abstract strategy and a high-performance commercial engine.

tiers.name: Align
tiers.subtitle: See Clearly. Fix First.
tiers.description: A focused 90-day engagement to diagnose where your revenue system is losing momentum. We bridge the 'Imagination Gap' by turning invisible leaks into a prioritized visual roadmap.
includes: A 90-day prioritized action plan based on 22+ structural checkpoints

tiers.name: Build
tiers.subtitle: Activate the Engine.
tiers.description: A 6-month partnership to install the operating layer your business is missing. This isn't just a plan—it's the automated infrastructure that captures signals and nurtures leads without manual effort.
includes: Custom Operating OS for visibility and automation
Automated signal capture across the buyer journey
Monthly operating reviews tied to 12+ real-time signals

tiers.name: Command
tiers.subtitle: Own It. Run It. Scale It.
tiers.description: A 12-month engagement for businesses ready to scale independently. We simplify your tool stack and harden your data model so the system runs predictably without outside help.
includes: Governance framework and clear ownership rules
Tool rationalization (Stop paying for tools you don't use)

phases.name: Align
phases.description: Diagnose the system and bridge the imagination gap. We identify the friction points you can't see.
milestones: System diagnostic across Awareness to Retention
Identify weak handoffs and missing social proof
Restructure site UI for buyer evaluation

phases.name: Build
phases.description: Activate the engine. We replace 'lazy design' and manual processes with visual swatches and automated signals.
milestones: Create a single source of truth for commercial data
Automate buyer signal capture (No more guessing)
Connect Marketing, Sales, and Delivery teams
Establish operating reviews tied to behavioral signals

phases.name: Command
phases.description: Total Independence. Your team owns the system. You own the results.
milestones: Define shared rules and stage definitions
Rationalize tools to serve the system, not vice-versa
Document and harden the Sovereign Engine
Build a system that improves via feedback loops
